channel.title: Posts on taskwitch
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on taskwitch

item.title: Hello World
item.description:
This is my first post. I am testing the Hugo framework and the PaperMod theme, as well as getting familiar with the setup (mostly code highlighting, markdown formatting, and equations 😆).

In this very first post (on the website built on graduation from high school), I will share an interesting problem that underlies an AP Computer Science A question my friend asked me during my senior year in high school.

True or false: will i sometimes equal 3?
